action.reasoning: Observation: Local test shows 100% success rate with scores: room=0.756, tunnel=1.101, outdoor=0.851. Average ~0.90. Previous best eval score was 0.5744. Analysis: The current planner (iter 22) achieves 100% success locally. Need to submit eval to see if this translates to better eval score. The key improvement was using utility-first greedy with BFS fallback. Decision: Submit eval immediately to measure current score.
